nodes.label: Support Isolation Rule
nodes.rationale: DO NOT EDIT CORE FRAMEWORK SCRIPTS. Editing core code immediately voids technical support. All modifications must be done inside the designated configuration files and registries.

nodes.label: Data-Driven Architecture
nodes.rationale: ModularFramework is built on a 100% data-driven architecture. The core logic relies exclusively on FeatureResolver.luau as the Single Source of Truth. This ensures features can be turned on/off via config files without rewriting internal circuitry.

nodes.label: FeatureToggles
nodes.rationale: Controls which game modules are active, allowing the starter kit to be configured as FPS, Clicker, RPG, or Pet Simulator without editing core files.

nodes.label: MockDataStores
nodes.rationale: Set to true to test locally without database errors (Offline Testing).

nodes.label: Portals Toggle
nodes.rationale: Physical portal objects will only instantiate in the workspace if their explicit feature flag is activated.

nodes.label: Leaderboards Toggle
nodes.rationale: Physical leaderboard objects will only instantiate in the workspace if their explicit feature flag is activated.

nodes.label: UIController
nodes.rationale: Automatically detects DamageNode in UpgradeRegistry, creates a new visual panel in the Upgrade Menu, formats the title, and connects purchase signals.

nodes.label: Offline Testing Setup
nodes.rationale: Configure Offline Testing by setting MockDataStores to true in FeatureToggles.luau to test locally without database errors.

nodes.label: Procedural User Interface
nodes.rationale: UI is entirely generated by scripts at runtime. Adding new items/upgrades/currencies only requires adding a text block to registry files.

nodes.label: Dynamic Scale Configuration
nodes.rationale: Dynamic, code-generated interfaces must adjust scale and sizes inside specific configuration files inside the Config folder to adapt seamlessly across desktop and mobile platforms.
